prompt: Create a traditional still life oil painting of the fruit arrangement from image 1, using the dramatic chiaroscuro lighting and textured background from image 2.
prompt_refined: Generate a traditional oil painting still life of the fruit arrangement from image 1, featuring oranges and red apples in a wooden bowl, centrally composed. Apply the dramatic chiaroscuro lighting and dark, mottled, textured background from image 2, ensuring the strong light source originates from the upper-left as depicted in image 2.
